source: checkpoint: best_gen0285.pt (gen 270 shipped Enhanced + 15-gen risky finishing, pop 50)
note: Risky/entertainment-focused variant of Enhanced. Training recipe: resumed from gen 270 (shipped Enhanced) with a synthetic 50-clone pop-50 seed; trained 15 gens at depth 8 with aggressive +3.0/0.0/-1.0 asymmetric scoring (wins worth 3x, losses only -1), quiescence OFF (plain alpha-beta), max-sigma 1.0. The risky scoring incentivizes winning attempts even at the cost of occasional losses, producing a model that plays for decisive outcomes instead of draw-shuffling. 50-game head-to-head vs shipped Enhanced at depth 6 RO=8: 6W/11L/33D (Enhanced +5) — 34% decisive-game rate, best measured (vs typical 20-26% between conservative models). Loses more than it wins vs Enhanced, but produces far more exciting games with fewer shuffle-draws.
